category_sources: Official GitHub README describes proxying usbmuxd requests over websockets for MobileSafari and UIWebViews.
source_facts.description says it is a DevTools proxy for iOS devices.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses iOS WebKit Debug Proxy.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains installation, usage, configuration, troubleshooting, and client API notes.
Official repository includes design.md for architecture/source-layout details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/google/ios-webkit-debug-proxy, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes Chrome DevTools, Safari Web Inspector, websocket proxying, and command-line usage.
source_facts.description identifies DevTools proxy for iOS devices.
